title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
At 9:45, local prosecutor Isam arrives at Broadwood in a county vehicle with three police officers. While Officer Wainwright engages Isam in conversation as a diversion, Ellery drives his Duesenberg to the Addley estate. Ellery meets Professor Yardley, and the two walk to Broadwood. Wainwright informs Ellery that Megalos is on his yacht due to a groin injury, and that Dr. Temple has been on the vessel, the *Helen*.

A group consisting of Isam, Vane, Yardley, and Ellery boards a patrol boat to reach the yacht. Upon boarding the *Helen*, they encounter Captain Swift and eventually enter the main cabin, where they find Stephen Megalas suffering from a hernia testis. Dr. Temple provides temporary pain relief and departs via motorboat.

Once alone with the group, the "policeman" is revealed to be Andrew Jagg Tewell, a headmaster. Megalas and Jagg reveal they are members of the Tveril clan from the Black Mountains. They explain a generational blood feud between the Tverils and the Croscos family. Twenty years prior, Megalas, Jagg, and a man named Tomislav had set a trap to kill the Croscos father and uncles. The only survivors were a child named Vilga and his mother, who fled to Montenegro and Italy. Megalas explains that they have been tracking the now-grown Vilga across Europe to protect themselves, as they expect him to seek vengeance, but he had disappeared until his recent reappearance.
